reviews.comment:
Unos estafadores me cobraron por cambio de aceite duster 1.6  . $19000 pesos una locura , además el flaco q me atendió me dijo q le puso refrigerante y toda una mentira por qué mí camioneta no necesitaba . Me estafaron . Son unos ladrones .

(Translated by Google)
Scammers charged me $19,000 pesos for an oil change on my Duster 1.6—it's insane! Plus, the guy who helped me said he added coolant, which was a complete lie because my truck didn't need it. I was ripped off. They're thieves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNldUtfZmNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos de urgencia un domingo debido a que se quemó una luz del auto, no solo tenían el repuesto sino que también lo instalaron.

Pudimos hacer ruta por la noche con total normalidad

(Translated by Google)
We went there on a Sunday because a car light had burned out. They not only had the replacement part, but they also installed it.

We were able to drive that night without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1b2ItaW93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui en enero para un servicio y al finalizar, el empleado recién me dijo que no tenía el aceite que recomienda ford, sino que le puso uno de menor calidad. Pésimo, podría haberlo dicho antes

(Translated by Google)
I went in January for a service, and only after it was finished did the employee tell me he didn't have the oil Ford recommends, but instead used a lower-quality one. Terrible; he could have mentioned it earlier.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1cjd6Rm1BRRAB
